glosses.vi: hướng dẫn viên; sách hướng dẫn
glosses.ja: ガイド; ガイドブック

sentences.target: Le guide nous attend devant l'entrée.

translations.fr: Le guide nous attend devant l'entrée.
translations.en: The guide is waiting for us at the entrance.
translations.es: El guía nos espera en la entrada.
translations.de: Der Guide wartet am Eingang auf uns.
translations.pt: O guia está esperando por nós na entrada.
translations.vi: Hướng dẫn viên đang đợi chúng tôi ở lối vào.
translations.nl: De gids wacht op ons bij de ingang.
translations.uk: Гід чекає на нас біля входу.
translations.hu: Az idegenvezető a bejáratnál vár ránk.
translations.hi: गाइड प्रवेश द्वार पर हमारा इंतज़ार कर रहा है.
translations.pl: Przewodnik czeka na nas przy wejściu.
translations.el: Ο ξεναγός μας περιμένει στην είσοδο.
translations.nb: Guiden venter på oss ved inngangen.
translations.id: Pemandu menunggu kami di pintu masuk.
translations.sv: Guiden väntar på oss vid entrén.
translations.cs: Průvodce na nás čeká u vchodu.
translations.da: Guiden venter på os ved indgangen.
translations.ja: ガイドが入口で私たちを待っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, introducing a specific noun.
Common noun referring to a guide (person). Head of the noun phrase.
1st person plural clitic object pronoun functioning as the direct object of the verb.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular of 'attendre' meaning 'to wait (for)'. Main predicate.
Preposition introducing a location complement.
Common noun 'entrée/entrance' preceded by elided definite article l' (le/la before vowel). Object of the preposition.

sentences.target: On suit le guide sur le sentier.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ sɥi lə ɡid syʁ lə sɑ̃tje/

translations.fr: On suit le guide sur le sentier.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ sɥi lə ɡid syʁ lə sɑ̃tje/
translations.en: We follow the guide along the trail.
translations.es: Seguimos al guía por el sendero.
translations.de: Wir folgen dem Guide auf dem Pfad.
translations.it: Seguiamo la guida lungo il sentiero.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们沿着小径跟着导游走。
translations.yue: 我哋沿住小徑跟住導遊行。
translations.ru: Мы идём за гидом по тропе.
translations.pt: Nós seguimos o guia pela trilha.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đi theo hướng dẫn viên dọc theo lối mòn.
translations.nl: We volgen de gids over het pad.
translations.hi: हम पगडंडी पर गाइड के पीछे चलते हैं.
translations.id: Kami mengikuti pemandu di sepanjang jalur.
translations.ro: Îl urmăm pe ghid de-a lungul potecii.
translations.ja: 私たちはガイドに従って小道を進みます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun ('one'); in everyday French often used for 'we'.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular of 'suivre' ('to follow'). Main predicate.
Definite article, masculine singular.
Common noun; direct object of 'suit'.
Preposition introducing a spatial complement.
Definite article, masculine singular.
Common noun meaning 'path/trail'; object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: Tu as un guide pour cette machine.
sentences.reading: /ty a ɛ̃ ɡid puʁ sɛt maʃin/

translations.fr: Tu as un guide pour cette machine.
translations.ipa: /ty a ɛ̃ ɡid puʁ sɛt maʃin/
translations.en: Do you have a manual for this machine?
translations.de: Hast du die Bedienungsanleitung für diese Maschine?
translations.it: Hai il manuale di questa macchina?
translations.zh-Hans: 你有这台机器的说明书吗？
translations.yue: 你有冇呢部機嘅說明書？
translations.ru: У тебя есть инструкция для этой машины?
translations.pt: Você tem o manual desta máquina?
translations.he: יש לך מדריך הפעלה למכונה הזאת?
translations.tr: Bu makinenin kullanım kılavuzu var mı?
translations.vi: Bạn có hướng dẫn sử dụng cho máy này không?
translations.ar: هل لديك دليل تشغيل لهذه الآلة؟
translations.nl: Heb je een handleiding voor deze machine?
translations.uk: У тебе є інструкція до цієї машини?
translations.hu: Van használati útmutató ehhez a géphez?
translations.hi: क्या इस मशीन का मैनुअल आपके पास है?
translations.pl: Masz instrukcję obsługi do tej maszyny?
translations.el: Έχεις εγχειρίδιο χρήσης για αυτή τη μηχανή;
translations.nb: Har du en bruksanvisning for denne maskinen?
translations.id: Apakah kamu punya buku petunjuk untuk mesin ini?
translations.sv: Har du en manual för den här maskinen?
translations.ro: Ai un manual pentru această mașină?
translations.da: Har du en brugervejledning til denne maskine?
translations.ja: この機械の取扱説明書はありますか。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 2nd person singular of 'avoir' ('to have'). Main verb.
Indefinite article, masculine singular.
Common noun; direct object of 'as' (can denote a manual or a person depending on context).
Preposition introducing a purpose or target complement.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular, agreeing with 'machine'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Je cherche un guide de la ville.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ ɛ̃ ɡid də la vil/

translations.fr: Je cherche un guide de la ville.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ ɛ̃ ɡid də la vil/
translations.en: I'm looking for a city guide.
translations.es: Estoy buscando una guía de la ciudad.
translations.it: Sto cercando una guida della città.
translations.pt: Estou procurando um guia da cidade.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm một cuốn cẩm nang thành phố.
translations.nl: Ik ben op zoek naar een stadsgids.
translations.hi: मैं शहर की मार्गदर्शिका ढूँढ रहा हूँ.
translations.ja: 街のガイドブックを探しています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 1st person singular of 'chercher' ('to look for'). Main predicate.
Indefinite article, masculine singular.
Common noun; direct object of 'cherche' (likely 'guidebook' in this context).
Preposition linking 'guide' to its complement ('la ville').
Definite article, feminine singular, agreeing with 'ville'.
Common noun; complement of 'de' specifying the kind of guide.
